title: rubus × semiprolongatus
intro: Rubus × semiprolongatus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or hybrid black thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × semiprolongatus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, extracts, and supplements, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
